cmakePath: Set the path to the CMake command
cmdCaseDiagnostics: Whether to generate warnings for non-lowercase CMake commands
workspaceIgnoreDirectories: Directory names to skip while indexing workspace CMake files
diagnostics.breakContinue: The command '{0}' can only be used within loops
diagnostics.cmdCase: It is recommended to use lowercase CMake commands
diagnostics.missingSubdirectory: add_subdirectory source dir '{0}' does not contain a CMakeLists.txt file
pkgConfigPath: Set the path to the pkg-config command, used to provide module completion in the pkg_check_modules command
